NOT_FOUND: The requested record was not found.
FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
PRO_REQUIRED: This feature is available for Pro accounts only.
DB_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
SERVICE_ERROR: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS: You don't have enough TUCi balance for this action.
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS_hint: You can top up your balance from the TUCi Wallet page.
LISTING_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to update this listing.
LISTING_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to delete this listing.
STREAM_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to edit this stream.
STREAM_END_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to end this stream.
STREAM_STATS_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to view this stream's stats.
STREAM_ACCESS_FORBIDDEN: Your access to this stream is restricted.
ALARM_ACCESS_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to access this alert.
HOST_ONLY_VIEW: Only the stream host can view this content.
HOST_OR_MOD_REQUIRED: Only the stream host or a moderator can perform this action.
STREAM_HOST_ONLY: Only the stream host can perform this action.
STREAM_HOST_ONLY_INVITE: Only the stream host can send stage invitations.
STREAM_HOST_ONLY_PERMISSIONS: Only the stream host can receive permissions.
HOST_CANNOT_BID: The stream host cannot bid on their own auction.
HOST_CANNOT_BUY: The stream host cannot purchase from their own auction.
STREAM_MUTED_BID: You have been muted in this stream. You cannot place bids.
BID_BLOCKED_MUTE: You have been muted in this stream. You cannot place bids.
STREAM_MUTED_PURCHASE: You have been muted in this stream. You cannot make purchases.
NO_STAGE_INVITATION: You don't have a valid stage invitation.
SELF_BID_FORBIDDEN: You cannot bid on your own listing.
SELF_MESSAGE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot send a message to yourself.
SELF_FAVORITE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot add your own listing to favorites.
SELF_REPORT_FORBIDDEN: You cannot report your own listing.
SELF_STREAM_JOIN_FORBIDDEN: You cannot join your own stream as a viewer.
LISTING_ALREADY_REPORTED: You have already reported this listing.
AUCTION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: There is already an active auction for this listing.
ACTIVE_CAMPAIGN_EXISTS: There is already an active campaign for this listing.
AUCTION_NOT_ACTIVE: The auction is not currently active.
AUCTION_NOT_PAUSED: The auction is not in a paused state.
BID_TOO_LOW: Your bid must be higher than the current bid.
CONCURRENT_BID_OUTBID: Concurrent bid: you were outbid, please try again.
BID_RATE_LIMIT: You are bidding too fast. Please wait a moment.
NO_BID_TO_ACCEPT: There is no bid to accept.
BIDS_EXCEED_BUY_NOW: Buy Now is no longer available as bids have exceeded that price.
BUY_NOW_UNAVAILABLE: Buy Now is not available for this item.
BUY_NOW_REJECTED_COOLDOWN: Your Buy Now request was rejected. Please wait before sending a new request.
NO_PENDING_BUY_NOW: There is no pending Buy Now request.
MONTHLY_LIMIT_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS: Your monthly free quota is used up and you don't have enough TUCi balance.
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS_BOOST: Your free boost quota for this month is used up and you don't have enough TUCi balance.
AI_SERVICE_TIMEOUT: The AI service did not respond. Please try again.
AI_SERVICE_BUSY: The AI service is currently busy. Please try again.
ANALYTICS_SERVICE_ERROR: The analytics service is temporarily unavailable.
BID_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the bid. Please try again.
BID_ACCEPT_FAILED: Failed to save the bid acceptance result.
PURCHASE_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the purchase. Please try again.
BUY_NOW_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send the Buy Now request.
BUY_NOW_ACCEPT_FAILED: Failed to accept the Buy Now request.
AUCTION_RESULT_FAILED: Failed to save the auction result.
INVALID_IMAGE_FORMAT: Only JPEG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed.
INVALID_IMAGE_FORMAT_GIF: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF images are allowed.
INVALID_VIDEO_FORMAT: Only MP4 or WebM videos are allowed.
INVALID_VIDEO_FORMAT_MOV: Only MP4, MOV, or WebM videos are allowed.
FILE_TOO_LARGE: File size must not exceed 10 MB.
VIDEO_TOO_LARGE: Video size must not exceed 200 MB.
INVALID_PRICE: A valid price must be entered.
RATING_REQUIRES_FOLLOW: You must follow this user to rate them.
ALARM_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can create a maximum of 5 active alerts.
CATEGORY_OR_SEARCH_REQUIRED: A category or search keyword is required.
STORY_MEDIA_URL_REQUIRED: A media URL is required for the story.
TRANSFER_AMOUNT_POSITIVE: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.
CALLER_BUSY: You are already in a call.
ALREADY_FOLLOWING: You are already following this user.
LISTING_RATE_LIMIT: You can create at most 1 listing per minute.
REQUEST_IN_PROGRESS: Your request is being processed, please wait.
CAPTCHA_MISSING: Captcha verification is missing. Please complete the captcha.
CAPTCHA_FAILED: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
STREAM_MOD_HOST_PROTECTED: A moderator cannot take action against the stream host.
STORY_NOT_FOUND: Story not found or has expired.
STORY_VIEWERS_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to view this story's viewers.
STORY_LOAD_FAILED: Stories could not be loaded, please try again.
INVALID_MEDIA_FORMAT: Invalid file format. You can upload a video or photo.
STORY_FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Maximum 20 MB allowed.
LIKE_FAILED: Like action could not be completed.
REFERRAL_ALREADY_USED: You have already used a referral code. Each account can only use one.
REFERRAL_SELF_USE: You cannot use your own referral code.
REFERRAL_INVALID: Invalid referral code. Please check and try again.
REFERRAL_EXPIRED: This referral code has expired (3-day validity period has ended).
STREAM_ALREADY_CLOSED: Stream not found or already closed.
EMAIL_OR_USERNAME_TAKEN: Email or username is already in use.
USER_FCM_NOT_FOUND: User not found or FCM token missing.
STORY_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to delete this story.
